title: Ralph SpecKit State
description: State file for tracking feature execution progress in the Ralph-SpecKit loop

featureId.description: Numeric feature ID with zero-padded prefix (e.g., 001)

basePath.description: Path to spec directory relative to repo root

taskIndex.description: Zero-based index of current task being executed

totalTasks.description: Total number of tasks in tasks.md

taskIteration.description: Retry count for the current task (resets per task)

globalIteration.description: Total loop iterations across all tasks

awaitingApproval.description: True if execution is paused for human approval

recoveryMode.description: Enable automatic fix-task generation on failure

maxFixTasksPerOriginal.description: Max fix attempts per failed task

lastReviewAt.description: taskIndex at which last artifact review was performed

reviewInterval.description: Run artifact review every N tasks
